subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 728706420/240204102 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 728706420/240204102 at 02:26:55.07 UT
on 04 February 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a solar flare."
